blocks.text: Kicking off a single thread for the {{fact:f:E-2023-001.client}} executive-messaging work, so status stays in one thread and nothing slips between us. Where things stand: the source pack is mostly assembled and I am partway through checking it against the documents Suarez-Jones sent over, the audience read is drafted, and there is a first cut of the leadership lines to push on.

Two things I need from you before we go further. First, take the source pack the rest of the way to verified this week, so we are not building lines on anything we cannot back. Second, pull together the specific questions only Jennifer Herrera can answer, and I will get them in front of her in one batch rather than piecemeal.

Once the framework is settled we should walk it together before it goes anywhere near the client, so we are not sending Jennifer Herrera anything we have not both read. Grab thirty minutes on my calendar later this week and we will go through it line by line.
